summary: Lead accepts the R0 production, fixture, and no-op runtime audit after the original systems_architect corrected the QA-requested chronology defect and independent QA R2 accepted the exact fix. Task remains ACCEPTED pending PR, required CI, and main integration.

tests_run.result: Independent QA R2 ACCEPT handoff is schema-valid.
Metadata fix and QA R2 review commits have no whitespace errors.
Task schema valid before lead acceptance.
Retained M7 worktree still has exactly 20 pre-existing status entries.

decisions.decision: Accept the static R0 evidence matrix as an authoritative planning baseline; it does not claim the Web/Electron runtime is already wired.
Do not create or start R1 implementation tasks until the remaining R0 status compaction and exit validation tasks are integrated.

risks.summary: The audit is static evidence; R1 must add runtime integration tests proving production Worker, command, query, time, and save/load roundtrips.

requested_action: Open the accepted audit PR, wait for required CI, merge to main, then close the task and enable RR0-STATUS-LEDGER-COMPACTION-001.
